calendar.matters:
Executor Sonia Gutierrez'S Petition To Terminate Probate Proccedings Due To Lack Of Estate Assets And Discharge Of Executor Pursuant To Probate Code Sec 12251
Off Calendar Jan-26-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eduardo Sandoval for Sonia Gutierrez.

The Court granted the Petition to Terminate Probate Proceedings, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Executor Sonia Gutierrez'S Petition To Terminate Probate Proccedings Due To Lack Of Estate Assets And Discharge Of Executor Pursuant To Probate Code Sec 12251
Off Calendar Jan-18-2012 Continued To Jan-25-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Executor Sonia Gutierrez'S Petition To Terminate Probate Proccedings Due To Lack Of Estate Assets And Discharge Of Executor Pursuant To Probate Code Sec 12251
Off Calendar Dec-14-2011 Continued To Jan-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Garcia specially appearing for Attorney Eduardo Sandoval for Sonia Gutierrez.

The Court expressed concerns about terminating the proceedings. The Petition to Terminate Probate Proceedings, etc. was continued to January 18, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Kendall.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-13-2011 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-28-2011 Continued To Dec-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Adams for Sonia Gutierrez (Executor).

The matter was continued to December 13, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a Petition to Terminate the Estate for Lack of Assets.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-24-2011 Continued To Sep-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eduardo Sandoval for Sonia Gutierrez.

The matter was continued to September 28, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Sandoval to address the issue of properly transferring the property to the Trust.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
